query:
SELECT 
  id, sport, away_team, home_team, game_date,
  away_book_spread, away_book_spread_odds,
  home_book_spread, home_book_spread_odds,
  book_total, book_over_odds, book_under_odds,
  away_ml, home_ml,
  away_model_spread, model_away_spread_odds,
  home_model_spread, model_home_spread_odds,
  model_total, model_over_odds, model_under_odds,
  model_away_ml, model_home_ml,
  published_model
FROM games
WHERE id = 2250006
